hero.subtitle: Graphic Designer & Product Designer
hero.statement: Designing digital experiences with clarity, strategy, and creativity.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am Azizbek Tursunov, a designer who bridges the gap between branding and interactive interfaces. Focused on Swiss minimalism, structural typography, and grid systems, I build memorable visual journeys. I collaborate with luxury studios and forward-thinking tech teams to deliver clean, functional, and creative designs.

timeline.desc: Directing visual strategies, mobile product interfaces, and interactive experiences for high-end clients.
Designed premium brand guidelines, packaging systems, and social media campaigns.
Built wireframes, UI layouts, and asset designs for web applications.

cleanpro-branding.title: CleanPro
cleanpro-branding.description: Logo, color system, and business card design for a cleaning service brand.
cleanpro-branding.overview: CleanPro is presented through a simple logo system, clear color applications, and business card layouts.
cleanpro-branding.problem: The identity needed to feel clean and professional while staying easy to apply across small print and digital formats.
cleanpro-branding.solution: A compact wordmark, fresh accent color, neutral backgrounds, and simple business card layouts create a practical brand base.
cleanpro-branding.process: Logo refinement -> color testing -> business card layout -> final export preparation.
cleanpro-branding.result: A concise identity package that gives CleanPro a polished and consistent visual presence.

kofemator-post.title: Kofemator
kofemator-post.description: Warm product ad layout for a Russell Hobbs espresso machine.
kofemator-post.overview: The Kofemator piece presents a coffee machine with pricing, rating, product details, and purchase actions in one focused layout.
kofemator-post.problem: The design needed to show product information clearly while still feeling premium and appetizing.
kofemator-post.solution: Warm coffee tones, a centered product render, structured information blocks, and high-contrast buttons make the ad easy to scan.
kofemator-post.process: Product hierarchy -> color direction -> layout composition -> detail styling -> final export.
kofemator-post.result: A polished product ad that balances e-commerce clarity with a rich coffee-inspired visual mood.

organic-product-flyer.title: Organic Product Flyer
organic-product-flyer.description: Tall product flyer layout for an organic personal care product line.
organic-product-flyer.overview: The organic flyer presents lavender-themed product items in a vertical layout with clear product names and volume labels.
organic-product-flyer.problem: The layout needed to show multiple products while keeping the poster calm, readable, and premium.
organic-product-flyer.solution: Soft sky imagery, product staging, lavender accents, and spaced labels create a clean product-focused composition.
organic-product-flyer.process: Product grouping -> vertical composition -> label hierarchy -> background treatment -> final poster export.
organic-product-flyer.result: A full-height product flyer concept with a clear catalog feel and gentle organic mood.

iqtidor-academy.title: Iqtidor Academy
iqtidor-academy.description: Education-focused social posts for grant and consulting messages.
iqtidor-academy.overview: The Iqtidor Academy visuals use bold type, academic cues, and bright brand colors for educational announcements.
iqtidor-academy.problem: The posts needed to communicate dense education-related information without becoming visually heavy.
iqtidor-academy.solution: Large headline typography, clear supporting blocks, and simple icon/visual hierarchy keep the messages readable.
iqtidor-academy.process: Message structure -> visual hierarchy -> brand color use -> asset composition -> social export.
iqtidor-academy.result: A set of direct, readable education posts with a consistent promotional style.

school-banner.title: Iqtidor School Banner
school-banner.description: Green admission banners for Russian language course promotion.
school-banner.overview: The school banners promote Russian language classes with student imagery, contact information, and a clear academic tone.
school-banner.problem: The banner had to fit course details, contact numbers, and branding into a compact promotional format.
school-banner.solution: A green education palette, strong headline type, and separated contact pills keep the offer clear at a glance.
school-banner.process: Brief review -> layout grid -> image placement -> contact hierarchy -> final banner export.
school-banner.result: A practical admission banner set that keeps the school message clear and parent-friendly.

social-media-design.title: Social Media Design
social-media-design.description: A collection of vertical posts for services, personalities, events, and food brands.
social-media-design.overview: This set explores different social formats, from bold service promotion to personal branding, masterclass, and food content.
social-media-design.problem: Each post needed a distinct mood while keeping the message immediately readable in a vertical feed.
social-media-design.solution: Strong typography, clear focal imagery, and controlled accent colors help each design stand on its own.
social-media-design.process: Content review -> style direction -> composition -> typography pass -> export for social use.
social-media-design.result: A varied social media set showing flexible layout, typography, and promotional design direction.

advertising-banners.title: Ijarachi Banners
advertising-banners.description: Wide advertising banners for a real estate and rental service concept.
advertising-banners.overview: The Ijarachi banners use architectural imagery, large Uzbek headlines, and service contact details in a wide format.
advertising-banners.problem: The format needed to stay readable across a very wide canvas while still feeling atmospheric.
advertising-banners.solution: Oversized headline blocks, a focused house visual, and grounded contact information create a clear promotional layout.
advertising-banners.process: Canvas planning -> headline hierarchy -> image composition -> contact layout -> final banner export.
advertising-banners.result: A pair of wide ad creatives with clear messaging and a premium real estate mood.

personal-projects.title: Personal Projects
personal-projects.description: Experimental vertical layouts for personal content and product flyer concepts.
personal-projects.overview: This project groups personal visual experiments, including a Spotify-themed vertical post and organic product flyer layouts.
personal-projects.problem: The pieces needed room for expressive styling while still preserving readable text and product information.
personal-projects.solution: Tall compositions, bold contrast, and controlled image placement create clear but more experimental visuals.
personal-projects.process: Concept sketch -> vertical layout -> typography exploration -> image treatment -> final export.
personal-projects.result: A focused set of personal design studies showing layout range across social and print-style formats.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: How I help brands stand out

items.title: Graphic Design
items.desc: Editorial layouts, premium packaging, print design, and visual assets built on rigorous grids.

items.title: Product design
items.desc: Responsive web and mobile interfaces that balance user needs, aesthetics, and technical feasibility.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.desc: Comprehensive brand guidelines, logos, custom typography, and visual assets that reflect brand strategy.

items.title: Social Media Content
items.desc: Structured template systems and motion designs that make your social presence premium and coherent.

skillsTools.title: Skills & Tools
skillsTools.subtitle: A compact toolkit for building clean brand systems, social content, and product-focused visuals.
